_comment: GitHub MCP Server — provides tools for issues, PRs, repos, and code search.
Install: Copy the 'github' key into .mcp.json under mcpServers.

_available: create_or_update_file    — Create or update a file in a repository
get_file_contents         — Read file or directory contents
push_files                — Push multiple files in a single commit
create_pull_request       — Create a new pull request
add_issue_comment         — Add a comment to an issue
list_commits              — List commits on a branch
get_issue                 — Get details of a specific issue
get_pull_request          — Get details of a specific PR
create_pull_request_review — Create a review on a PR
